2217470.name: Rewilders: The Lost Spring
2217470.description:
What if nature could fight back?

Rewilders is an open-world action roguelite with creature collection and metroidvania-style progression, telling an emotionally impactful story about friendship, family, responsibility, and restoration.

Explore corrupted biomes and face twisted creatures born from a failed society. Each run drops you into a dynamic open world filled with hostile enemies. Use metroidvania-inspired traversal abilities like a glider, grappling hook, or wall-running to reach and explore new biomes.

Restore ecosystems through action: rewild areas, reactivate Springs, and bring life back one biome at a time. As the world heals, its original inhabitants return—the Hântu, reawakened native creatures once driven to extinction. They join your fight, expand your abilities, and can be fed and leveled up to build your own team and combat style, adapting your strategy on every run.

In your skyship base, grow plants from seeds and resources gathered during exploration to unlock permanent buffs, evolve your companions, and prepare for the next descent.

Collect unique creatures with active abilities, status effects, and passive bonuses. Each excels against certain enemy types, letting you counter the foes you find most challenging and making the souls-like combat curve more approachable for casual players while still rewarding skill.

Fight using Abi’s melee, ranged, and special attacks while combining them with Hântu abilities. Learn enemy patterns, adapt to their behaviors, and face multi-phase Tormented bosses whose defeat grants traversal tools and key upgrades.

Each run changes starting points, enemies, and rewards. Persistent upgrades earned in your skyship let you grow stronger over time, encouraging experimentation with different builds and Hântu combinations.

Unlock traversal tools like the glider, wall-run, and grappling hook to access new paths, hidden areas, biomes, and shortcuts, adding layers of progression to the interconnected world.

Return to your customizable hub above the clouds to plant and cultivate rare flora for permanent buffs, feed your companions with their favourite food, and decorate your ship into a lush floating garden in a sea of clouds.
2217470.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 加泰罗尼亚语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
